name: JosiDog Active 15kg
shortDescription: The nutrient-rich, gluten-free formula of JosiDog Active ensures very active dogs get all the energy they need. With extra power, this high-energy food is suitable for sporting and very active dogs. Complete feed for adult dogs.
description: Composition: Active – Complete feed for adult dogs, Composition: dried poultry protein; whole-grain corn; rice; poultry fat; beet fibre; hydrolysed poultry protein; minerals; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); dried meat from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus). Product Details: The nutrient-rich, gluten-free formula of JosiDog Active ensures very active dogs get all the energy they need. With extra power, this high-energy food is suitable for sporting and very active dogs. Complete feed for adult dogs
